data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures user data is encrypted both during transmission and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS encryption for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for stored data.

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control policies to protect sensitive data and systems from unauthorized access.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments and vulnerability scans to identify and remediate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Automated security scanners and third-party security audits.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements robust defenses to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Cloud-based DDoS protection services & traffic analysis tools.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive incident response strategies to rapidly address and contain security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Defined breach response protocols with a dedicated incident response team.
